description: Critical Red Flags set a CEILING on Quality Score. A company with active SCA cannot score higher than the ceiling, regardless of other factors.

escalation_triggers.name: Active Securities Class Action
escalation_triggers.condition: Company has pending securities class action lawsuit
escalation_triggers.action: BACKWARD mode analysis, escalate to senior underwriter
escalation_triggers.new_business_context: Prior carrier's problem - potential entry point at right price/attachment

escalation_triggers.name: Wells Notice Disclosed
escalation_triggers.condition: Active SEC enforcement Wells Notice disclosed in filings
escalation_triggers.action: Escalate to senior underwriter, consider excess only

escalation_triggers.name: DOJ Criminal Investigation
escalation_triggers.action: Escalate to senior underwriter, likely decline

escalation_triggers.name: Going Concern Opinion
escalation_triggers.condition: Auditor issued going concern qualification in most recent audit
escalation_triggers.action: WALK tier ceiling, financial distress review, Side A DIC opportunity
escalation_triggers.side_a_note: Going concern = Side A value increases

escalation_triggers.name: Restatement in Past 12 Months
escalation_triggers.condition: Material restatement announced within last 12 months

escalation_triggers.name: SPAC Under $5
escalation_triggers.condition: SPAC merger <18 months ago AND current stock price <$5
escalation_triggers.source_signal: 8-K merger completion date, current stock price
escalation_triggers.action: Enhanced scrutiny, likely WALK or decline

escalation_triggers.name: Short Seller Report
escalation_triggers.condition: Named in activist short seller report within 6 months
escalation_triggers.source_signal: Hindenburg, Citron, Muddy Waters, Spruce Point, Kerrisdale research sites
escalation_triggers.action: Full allegations review, response quality assessment

escalation_triggers.name: Catastrophic Stock Drop
escalation_triggers.condition: Stock decline >60% from 52-week high, company-specific (not sector/market)

escalation_triggers.name: Recent Drop - 7 Day
escalation_triggers.action: PAUSE BINDING until drop analyzed - may be binding INTO exposure window

escalation_triggers.name: Recent Drop - 30 Day
escalation_triggers.action: Attribution analysis required - within typical 89-day filing window

escalation_triggers.name: Recent Drop - 90 Day
escalation_triggers.action: Attribution analysis, still in primary exposure window

escalation_triggers.name: Active DOJ Criminal Investigation
escalation_triggers.condition: Active Department of Justice criminal investigation disclosed
escalation_triggers.detection_logic: Check LIT.REG.* for DOJ investigation evidence in check results
escalation_triggers.source_signal: 10-K legal proceedings, regulatory data, check results

escalation_triggers.name: Distress Zone (Altman Z < 1.81)
escalation_triggers.condition: Altman Z-Score below 1.81 indicating financial distress zone
escalation_triggers.detection_logic: Check FIN.ACCT.altman_z_score value < 1.81 in check results
escalation_triggers.action: Financial distress review, Side A analysis

escalation_triggers.name: Caremark Claim Survived Dismissal
escalation_triggers.condition: Caremark/oversight duty claim has survived motion to dismiss
escalation_triggers.detection_logic: Check LIT.OTHER.* for Caremark-related litigation in check results

escalation_triggers.name: Executive Forensics Aggregate > 50
escalation_triggers.condition: Board aggregate executive risk score exceeds 50 (elevated)

escalation_triggers.name: Financial Integrity Score < 20 (Critical)
escalation_triggers.condition: Financial Integrity Score in CRITICAL zone

escalation_triggers.name: Whistleblower/Qui Tam Disclosure
escalation_triggers.condition: Whistleblower or qui tam complaint disclosed in filings
escalation_triggers.detection_logic: Check NLP.WHISTLE.language_detected TRIGGERED in check results

processing_rules.check_order: Check ALL triggers BEFORE calculating factor scores
processing_rules.multiple_triggers: Use the LOWEST ceiling when multiple triggers fire
processing_rules.escalation_required: Any trigger = mandatory escalation to senior underwriter
processing_rules.backward_mode: Active SCA (CRF-01) triggers BACKWARD analysis mode

renewal_context.description: Critical red flags have different implications for renewals vs new business

rules.new_business: Prior carrier's problem - entry point opportunity
rules.renewal: You're sitting on the claim - NO TOUCH

rules.new_business: May resolve before your policy - WATCH position
rules.renewal: Your problem if escalates - WALK unless exceptional pricing

steps: Check for trigger event (earnings, guidance, news)
If company-specific + earnings/guidance trigger = HIGH ALERT
Still in exposure window but less urgent
